strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to lead and contribute to complex systems including AI-agent infrastructure and GIS platforms
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical education, indicating deep curiosity and communication skills
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) and responsibilities appear significantly senior compared to the junior/mid-level role
Limited evidence of direct experience with PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy/construction tech domains
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures with strong engineering discipline, but their seniority level, lack of domain alignment, and limited German proficiency raise concerns about role fit and on-site collaboration despite technical strengths.
